changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.createProcedure:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION gps_track_update_trigger() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE' OR TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN INSERT INTO gps_track_audit ( version, operation, changed_at, id, file_id, creator, gpx_version, meta_name, meta_description, meta_time, meta_author, track_name, track_description, start_date, end_date, median_distance_between_points, avg_distance_between_points, max_distance_between_points, did_filter_outlier_by_distance, number_of_track_points, track_length_in_meter, track_type, utm_zone, create_date, load_status, load_messages, duplicate_status, duplicate_of, activity_type, activity_type_source, activity_type_source_details, garmin_activity_id, meta_link, duplicate_details, update_date, source_segment_index, source_parent_track_id ) SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) + 1, TG_OP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, OLD.id, OLD.file_id, OLD.creator, OLD.gpx_version, OLD.meta_name, OLD.meta_description, OLD.meta_time, OLD.meta_author, OLD.track_name, OLD.track_description, OLD.start_date, OLD.end_date, OLD.median_distance_between_points, OLD.avg_distance_between_points, OLD.max_distance_between_points, OLD.did_filter_outlier_by_distance, OLD.number_of_track_points, OLD.track_length_in_meter, OLD.track_type, OLD.utm_zone, OLD.create_date, OLD.load_status, OLD.load_messages, OLD.duplicate_status, OLD.duplicate_of, OLD.activity_type, OLD.activity_type_source, OLD.activity_type_source_details, OLD.garmin_activity_id, OLD.meta_link, OLD.duplicate_details, OLD.update_date, OLD.source_segment_index, OLD.source_parent_track_id FROM gps_track_audit WHERE id = OLD.id;
ELSIF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO gps_track_audit ( version, operation, changed_at, id, file_id, creator, gpx_version, meta_name, meta_description, meta_time, meta_author, track_name, track_description, start_date, end_date, median_distance_between_points, avg_distance_between_points, max_distance_between_points, did_filter_outlier_by_distance, number_of_track_points, track_length_in_meter, track_type, utm_zone, create_date, load_status, load_messages, duplicate_status, duplicate_of, activity_type, activity_type_source, activity_type_source_details, garmin_activity_id, meta_link, duplicate_details, update_date, source_segment_index, source_parent_track_id ) SELECT 1, TG_OP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NEW.id, NEW.file_id, NEW.creator, NEW.gpx_version, NEW.meta_name, NEW.meta_description, NEW.meta_time, NEW.meta_author, NEW.track_name, NEW.track_description, NEW.start_date, NEW.end_date, NEW.median_distance_between_points, NEW.avg_distance_between_points, NEW.max_distance_between_points, NEW.did_filter_outlier_by_distance, NEW.number_of_track_points, NEW.track_length_in_meter, NEW.track_type, NEW.utm_zone, NEW.create_date, NEW.load_status, NEW.load_messages, NEW.duplicate_status, NEW.duplicate_of, NEW.activity_type, NEW.activity_type_source, NEW.activity_type_source_details, NEW.garmin_activity_id, NEW.meta_link, NEW.duplicate_details, NEW.update_date, NEW.source_segment_index, NEW.source_parent_track_id; END IF; RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE TRIGGER gps_track_audit_trigger AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON public.gps_track FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION gps_track_update_trigger();

changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.createProcedure: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION indexed_file_trigger() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE' OR TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN INSERT INTO indexed_file_audit( audit_version, operation, changed_at, id, index, name, path, base_path, full_path, size, hash, last_modified_date, create_date, index_added_date, index_update_date, indexer_status, indexer_id, indexer_invocations, last_message, entity_version ) SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(audit_version), 0) + 1 FROM indexed_file_audit WHERE id = OLD.id), TG_OP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, OLD.id, OLD.index, OLD.name, OLD.path, OLD.base_path, OLD.full_path, OLD.size, OLD.hash, OLD.last_modified_date, OLD.create_date, OLD.index_added_date, OLD.index_update_date, OLD.indexer_status, OLD.indexer_id, OLD.indexer_invocations, OLD.last_message, OLD.version; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO indexed_file_audit( audit_version, operation, changed_at, id, index, name, path, base_path, full_path, size, hash, last_modified_date, create_date, index_added_date, index_update_date, indexer_status, indexer_id, indexer_invocations, last_message, entity_version ) SELECT 1, TG_OP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NEW.id, NEW.index, NEW.name, NEW.path, NEW.base_path, NEW.full_path, NEW.size, NEW.hash, NEW.last_modified_date, NEW.create_date, NEW.index_added_date, NEW.index_update_date, NEW.indexer_status, NEW.indexer_id, NEW.indexer_invocations, NEW.last_message, NEW.version; END IF; RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE TRIGGER indexed_file_audit_trigger AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON public.indexed_file FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION indexed_file_trigger();

changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.createProcedure: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION config_trigger() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE' OR TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN INSERT INTO config_audit SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) + 1 FROM config_audit WHERE id = OLD.id), -- Audit field: version TG_OP, -- Audit field: operation CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, -- Audit field: changed_at OLD.* -- All other columns from the OLD record ; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO config_audit SELECT 1, -- Audit field: version TG_OP, -- Audit field: operation CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, -- Audit field: changed_at NEW.* -- All other columns from the NEW record ; END IF; RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE TRIGGER config_audit_trigger AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON public.config FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION config_trigger();

changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.createProcedure: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION filter_config_trigger() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE' OR TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN INSERT INTO filter_config_audit ( version, operation, changed_at, id, filter_domain, filter_name, expression, filter_type, filter_category, description, display_name, display_order, create_date, update_date ) SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) + 1 FROM filter_config_audit WHERE id = OLD.id), TG_OP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, OLD.id, OLD.filter_domain, OLD.filter_name, OLD.expression, OLD.filter_type, OLD.filter_category, OLD.description, OLD.display_name, OLD.display_order::BIGINT, OLD.create_date, OLD.update_date; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO filter_config_audit ( version, operation, changed_at, id, filter_domain, filter_name, expression, filter_type, filter_category, description, display_name, display_order, create_date, update_date ) SELECT 1, TG_OP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NEW.id, NEW.filter_domain, NEW.filter_name, NEW.expression, NEW.filter_type, NEW.filter_category, NEW.description, NEW.display_name, NEW.display_order::BIGINT, NEW.create_date, NEW.update_date; END IF; RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE TRIGGER filter_config_audit_trigger AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE OR DELETE ON public.filter_config FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION filter_config_trigger();

changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.createProcedure: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION config_trigger() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE' OR TG_OP = 'DELETE') THEN INSERT INTO config_audit ( version, operation, changed_at, id, domain1, domain2, domain3, value, description, create_date, update_date ) SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) + 1 FROM config_audit WHERE id = OLD.id), TG_OP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, OLD.id, OLD.domain1, OLD.domain2, OLD.domain3, OLD.value, OLD.description, OLD.create_date, OLD.update_date; ELSIF (TG_OP = 'INSERT') THEN INSERT INTO config_audit ( version, operation, changed_at, id, domain1, domain2, domain3, value, description, create_date, update_date ) SELECT 1, TG_OP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NEW.id, NEW.domain1, NEW.domain2, NEW.domain3, NEW.value, NEW.description, NEW.create_date, NEW.update_date; END IF; RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
